title: taraxacum stereodiforme
intro: Taraxacum stereodiforme, commonly known as the Japanese dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include being a natural diuretic, reducing blood pressure, and supporting liver function. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum stereodiforme include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
